ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job role of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time, contractor) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number for international employees */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee's direct manager */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level in the organizational hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the department */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the department information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job role */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the job role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the job role belongs to */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the job role */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications required for the job role */,
  "is_remote" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job can be performed remotely */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location where the job is based (if not remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary adjustment */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee whose salary was adjusted */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* New salary amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the salary adjustment became effective */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary adjustment */,
  "previous_salary" REAL /* Salary before the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_percentage" REAL /* Percentage by which the salary was adjusted */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who approved the salary adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the performance review was conducted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date for the next performance review */,
  "goals_achieved" TEXT /* Goals achieved during the review period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee receiving the bonus */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bonus */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the bonus was awarded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the bonus */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of bonus (e.g., performance, referral) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who approved the bonus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the benefit */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the benefit */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the benefit is mandatory for employees */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "eb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-benefit assignment */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit ended (if applicable) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit is due for renewal */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the benefit enrollment (e.g., active, pending, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training program */,
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* ID of the instructor conducting the training */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification provided upon completion */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates if the training is mandatory for employees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_trainings" (
  "et_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-training assignment */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the training program was completed */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or evaluation of the employee's performance in the training */,
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* ID of the instructor */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "certification_awarded" INTEGER /* Indicates if a certification was awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("et_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_trainings_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_trainings_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_trainings_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee making the leave request */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., vacation, sick leave) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave request */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who approved the leave request */,
  "hours_requested" REAL /* Number of hours requested for leave */,
  "total_days" INTEGER /* Total number of days of leave */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the EMS */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the EMS was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job history record */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job role */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the job role change */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the job role belongs to */,
  "is_promotion" INTEGER /* Indicates if the job change was a promotion */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who approved the job change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
